scripts.test: node scripts/cargo-test-workspace.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/route_manifest_openapi_parity_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/openapi_phase1_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/schema_registry_phase1_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/native_sql_migration_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/memory_database_migration_parity_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/runtime_plugin_layout_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/open_api_prefix_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/rust_spi_boundary_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/spi_design_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contract/database-framework.contract.test.mjs && node --test sdks/test/verify-sdk-ownership-boundaries.test.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm run check:app-composition && pnpm check:architecture-alignment && pnpm check:release-readiness && pnpm check:pnpm-script-standard && pnpm check:agent-workflow-standard && pnpm check:pagination && pnpm check:api-envelope && pnpm check:sdk-standard && pnpm topology:validate && pnpm db:validate
scripts.verify: node tools/materialize_phase1_contracts.mjs && node sdks/standardize-memory-sdk-family.mjs && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/verify_phase1.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/verify_sdkwork_structure.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/verify_openapi_operation_ids.ps1 && node scripts/cargo-test-workspace.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/route_manifest_openapi_parity_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/openapi_phase1_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/schema_registry_phase1_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/native_sql_migration_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/memory_database_migration_parity_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/runtime_plugin_layout_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/open_api_prefix_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/rust_spi_boundary_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/spi_design_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contract/database-framework.contract.test.mjs && node --test sdks/test/verify-sdk-ownership-boundaries.test.mjs && pnpm check && node tools/check_sdkwork_memory_architecture_alignment.mjs
scripts.sdk:generate:ts: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-memory-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-memory-app-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-memory-backend-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript
